title: Useful Copper
body:
## What is this?
Minecraft added copper in version 1.17, but it's not very useful, so they added tools that can be crafted with copper.
## Features:
- Added Copper tools
 > Harvest level is same as iron. 
 > Attack damage/speed and mining speed is same as diamond.
 > Durabillity is 96.

## Added items:
- Copper Sword
- Copper Pickaxe
- Copper Axe
- Copper Hoe
- Copper Shovel

## Screenshots:

![All items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92d1dc6a1796168cf4875a48370bf052c2dd8d2.png)
